query:
SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  email,
  phone,
  program,
  source,
  LEFT(message, 100) as msg_preview,
  FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000) as created_at
FROM trialSignups
WHERE createdAt > UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CURDATE()) * 1000
ORDER BY createdAt ASC
LIMIT 20;

  FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000) as created_at
FROM trialSignups
WHERE createdAt > UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CURDATE()) * 1000
ORDER BY createdAt ASC
